creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 210571
svn(1) diff against the ports tree

wishbone-utils is the target of a workshop geared towards working with Fomu[0], an FPGA which fits in your USB port, but more generic to Wishbone[1] busses in general.

[0] https://tomu.im/fomu.html
[1] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wishbone_(computer_bus)

Q/A:
 * testport: OK (11.3-RELEASE, amd64; 12.1-RELEASE, amd64; -CURRENT, amd64)
 * portlint: looks fine. (portlint -AC)
